articles.author: Iain Carter
articles.title: PGA Tour, DP World Tour & Asian Tour alliance puts pressure on LIV - BBC
articles.description: LIV Golf suffers another setback with the announcement of a global alliance between three of the leading men's tours.
articles.content:
LIV Golf has suffered another blow with the announcement of a global alliance between the leading men's professional tours.
Masters champion Rory McIlroy has welcomed the partnership that the PGA To… [+1911 chars]
